text:
Saturday, 21 March 2026, 14:47

21 March 2026

According to theBTU, the official reason for Kalinina's refusal is illness, Ukrinform reports.





It is assumed that yesterday's cold weather in Paris, during which the Ukrainian had to warm up several times in anticipation of her opening match, which ultimately did not take place due to rain, had an effect.





Instead of Kalinina, Olivia Gadecki from Australia will play in the singles at the 2024 Olympics.

title: Kalinina not to play in tennis tournament at 2024 Olympics
description: Ukrainian tennis player Anhelina Kalinina was scheduled to play a first-round singles match at the 2024 Olympic Games against Aranchi Rous from the Netherlands today. — Ukrinform.
